backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining data types (Journey, LocationInfo, UserProfile, CityRating, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, WebsiteLayoutSettings, ScheduleItem, MapBookmark, VibeItem, GeonameCity) and state variables using OrderedMaps for storing application data with BlobStorage and AccessControl integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: UTC info display in WebsiteLayoutPanel under Map Settings and local time display in LocationMapExplorer under UTC Offset Selection button, both showing format 'UTC+HH:MM: HH:MM:SS'.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend components including App.tsx, map components, query hooks, admin panels, media galleries, and various UI components with their key functionality and recent enhancements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Country Map Explorer application that includes SunCalc library for solar calculations and mounts the React app to the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient, ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders LocationMapExplorer with BackendDebugger and Toaster components.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Comprehensive admin control panel with journey management (add/edit/delete with calendar date-range picker and time inputs), schedule item management, and collapsible sections for TravelSpotManager, MusicAlbumManager, GeonameGeographicalManager, and TimezoneManagement.
Development utility component that exposes the backend actor to window.backend for console debugging, displays current principal and role information, and provides instructions for admin operations and security warnings.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: City album management component with file upload (images/videos), real-time social media URL validation, media gallery display, and file deletion functionality, requiring Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: Component file appears to be empty or contains only whitespace.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: React component for managing geographical city data from Geoname files, providing upload, search, pagination, CRUD operations, and classification of cities by feature codes (capital, global, major, regional, etc.).
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: React component that renders a 10-heart rating system with support for decimal ratings (0.1 increments), partial heart fills, hover effects, and both interactive and read-only modes.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: Complex 3D globe component using Three.js that displays countries, cities, borders, timezone overlays, day/night terminator, twilight zones, flight animations, and interactive features with camera controls and raycasting.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: Renders journey itineraries in a playful scrapbook/polaroid style with colorful gradients and handwritten fonts. Displays schedule items grouped by day with decorative styling and animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: React component that renders a vintage postcard-styled itinerary dialog with retro design elements (stamps, postmarks, ribbons) displaying journey schedule organized by days with activities and times.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: Dialog component for adding, updating, or deleting location information with photo upload functionality, including file validation, preview, and blob storage integration.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: Authentication panel component using Internet Identity for login/logout, displaying authentication status, principal ID, and handling authentication state with query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: Leaflet-based map component displaying travel spots, bookmarks, and schedule items with custom icons, popups, city filtering, route visualization, and support for focused markers and journey filtering.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: Displays a tabbed media gallery popup with support for photos, videos, and embedded social media content (YouTube, Instagram). Includes carousel navigation, fullscreen viewing, and utilities for extracting video IDs and creating embed URLs.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: Admin interface for managing music albums and songs with CRUD operations, file uploads, search/filter functionality, and integration with backend queries. Handles album creation, song uploads, and displays album/song metadata with authentication checks.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: Dialog component that displays a browsable music collection organized by albums, allowing users to select and play songs. Shows album artwork, song metadata, and integrates with authentication and music playback controls.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: Persistent music player bar with playback controls (play/pause, skip, volume), progress tracking, and auto-play functionality. Manages audio state, supports external song selection, and respects user layout preferences for visibility.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: Admin component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data with validation, IndexedDB caching, and backend persistence. Includes manual execution workflow with step-by-step verification and toast notifications for each operation.
Displays journeys in a collapsible panel with filtering (live/upcoming/past), schedule management, and itinerary views. Supports flight animations, 2D map navigation, and both doodle and retro itinerary dialog styles.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: Manages travel spots with CRUD operations, file uploads, social media links, and heart ratings. Provides a dialog-based UI for creating/editing spots with city filtering, media management, and type categorization.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: Shows a categorized view of bookmarks and travel spots grouped by city and type with collapsible sections. Provides focus callbacks for map integration and displays type-specific icons and colors.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: Settings panel for website layout preferences including music player toggle, default search location, and time display with UTC offset. Shows local and UTC time with real-time updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend data operations including journeys, locations, media, travel spots, music, and website settings, with geocoding via Nominatim API and social media URL validation for YouTube/Instagram.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including color schemes for UI components, sidebar, charts, and a light blue music player theme with specific heading color rules for different background modes.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides solar declination angle calculation for astronomical computations based on day of year, with test cases for equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Utility functions to find timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset with quarter-hour precision, using Intl API for DST-aware calculations.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Handles timezone boundary detection and local time calculations, loading timezone GeoJSON data from backend or IndexedDB cache with point-in-polygon detection.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Timezone boundary rendering library for 3D globe visualization using Three.js, handling coordinate conversion, polygon unwrapping across antimeridian, quarter-hour offset precision, and DST-aware timezone filtering using Intl API.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main page component for location exploration with 2D/3D map views, search functionality, timezone visualization, music player, and various panels for travelogues, vibes, and admin controls.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and utility functions for styling schedule items by day, including day label generation and date formatting.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups and sorts schedule items by calendar day and time, building chronological route data for multi-day itineraries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, container settings, border radius utilities, custom animations for accordions, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a 3D globe application tracking implemented features for UTC offset selection and time displays in WebsiteLayoutPanel and LocationMapExplorer components, with two pending feature requests for UTC info displays.
